title: Crispy Smoky White Chocolate Salad
description: A fresh and light Norwegian dish featuring crisp white chocolate leaves marinated in smoke for a unique twist on a traditional salad.
instructions: Prepare the white chocolate leaves by finely chopping it.
Soak the white chocolate in salted caramel syrup for at least 5 minutes, until fully coated and melted slightly.
Drizzle a little avocado oil over the soiled white chocolate and sprinkle with smoke flakes.
Place on preheated baking sheet and bake for about 10-15 minutes, or until crispy. Turn off heat but leave it inside to cool down.
Gently remove from oven, allowing them to cool slightly before serving in a fresh green salad leaves.
